creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Light up your Dubai nights with #DubaiLights!

Check out the sparkling art and light installations in City Walk and Palm Jumeirah’s Nakheel Mall, The Pointe and Palm West Beach!

Featured in this reel are the vibrant installations @citywalkdubai. My favorites are “Submergence“ where you can walk through colorful hanging lights and “Never Ends” which is an interactive and playful horse artwork. 

🗓️ Until January 29, 2023

Plan your visit now. Tag your family and friends! 

@celebratedubai #CityWalkDubai @styledbydubai #mydsf #visitDubai #Dubai
